title: ぴかぴかコーラルフラワー

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: O luggage—pack! Alstroemeria! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm all ready for summer camp! Looks like speed magic is pretty
handy for packing, too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Got it, Doggy? While I'm out for camp, it'll be your job to stand guard
over this roo—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you wanna come with me? Hmph, you're such a wimp. I guess I'll
take you along then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, my summer camp with Sweep Tosho begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How Umamusume spend their time here is important, so I put a lot of
effort into planning the best training menu I could.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant...Pant... Ugh, it's sooo hot!
choice_data_list: Well done, now go take a break in the shade!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Glug... glug... Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey familiar, where're you going?!
choice_data_list: Just getting ready! Sweep, you rest!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Geez, as long as you don't work yourself ragged...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You tell me to rest, but you're the one running around everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...When are you supposed to take a break? Doggy, you think so too,
don't you?

text_block_list.name: Local Lady A
text_block_list.text: It's real hot again today. On days like this, you gotta drink that!

text_block_list.name: Local Lady B
text_block_list.text: Oh, the magic juice. Then we simply must go to the mountains and gather the ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Magic?! Did I hear that right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the rest of the day, we keep on working our way through the
training menu I prepared...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: All right, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having rested up, Sweep's able to breeze through the whole routine
with exceptional focus!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... That's everything... for today, right? Then I'm headed to the mountains!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm free to do whatever I want after practice, aren't I? There's
something I gotta find in the mountains!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Geez, why'd you come with me! This'd be way faster by myself!
choice_data_list: I'd worry if you were alone.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but who's the one gasping for breath?! I won't forgive
you if you slow me down!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! What's going on?! They said you could find it near the
top!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nothing here, either... Ugh, why can't I find it?!
choice_data_list: The sun's about to set, so—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Shut up, that's why I'm in a rush! Stop complaining and help me look!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Here, go look together with Doggy! We're looking for green, spiky
leaves!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The plushie in Sweep's hands has a face that seems to say, "Please
put up with her for a little longer."

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It has to be here! I swear upon the name of Magical Girl Sweepy that I'll find it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: There's nothing a great witch-in-training can't find... Huh? Wait!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I found it! Look familiar, I finally found it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After descending the mountain, she told me to wait a while, so here I
am taking a stroll on the beach—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Geez, what're you doing here? You even made me look for you!
Gosh, the things I do for you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But rejoice, familiar! This is a Sweepy-original magical potion—just for
you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's a potion made from local medicinal herbs! I even placed an
anti-heatstroke charm on it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she went on that hiking trip to gather herbs. If this is meant to
prevent heatstroke, then Sweep must've been worried about how I
was doing.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, it wasn't really for you—I was only practicing. I need to know if
it works, so drink it already.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I hope you're ready, because it's really bitter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just like she warned me, the magical potion has a rather acrid taste!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Familiar, you should see your face! Figures, since just a
taste had me gagging earlier.
choice_data_list:
The flavor is really something... but I do feel
better.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Of course you do—I'm a great witch-in-training, after all. Perfecting a
potion is as easy as pie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, huge fireworks go off, brightly lighting up the
evening shore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pew... BOOM!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Big fireworks! Wowie, wow!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I have to show Doggy this too. Look, these fireworks are
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What, you got something to say, Doggy?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph, wrong again. Didn't I say it wasn't for my familiar?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nothing, nada, zilch! Actually, I still have some potion left, so you
better drink the rest tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho hugs her plushie tightly, and under the illumination of
the fireworks, I can see that her cheeks are flushed bright red.
